Title: User can register for the application
Preconditions: None

1. Open the Weather To Go application
2. Click on the 'Register' button
3. Enter a valid email address and password
4. Confirm the password
5. Click on the 'Register' button
Expected Result: The user should be successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: User can log in to the application

Title: User can register a new trip

Expected Result: The trip should be successfully removed from the user's profile.

Title: User Registration

4. Submit the registration form.

4. Save the changes.

3. Enter the trip details.
4. Save the trip.
Expected Result: The trip is added to the user trips.

2. Navigate to the trip details section.
3. Select the trip to view.
4. Verify the trip details.
Expected Result: The user will view the trip details in a prepared screen.

2. Navigate to the account settings.
